description_long: This is a compact hatchback car with a streamlined, utilitarian design typical of late 20th-century European models. The body is painted a light silver-gray color, with black trim running along the lower edge of the doors and bumpers. The front features a wide, horizontal grille flanked by rectangular headlights and small amber turn signals. The side profile reveals two passenger doors and a rear hatch, with simple, circular hubcaps on the wheels and black side mirrors. The rear view shows rectangular taillights, a rear windshield wiper, and a subtle rear bumper, with no visible manufacturer or model badges. The windows are tinted dark, and the overall appearance suggests a practical, everyday urban vehicle.
description: A compact, silver-gray hatchback car with black trim, two side doors, and a rear hatch, featuring simple hubcaps and rectangular headlights and taillights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and black bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying two doors, black trim, and circular hubcaps.
description_view_2: Rear view with rectangular taillights, rear hatch, and black bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with two doors and black trim.
